summary: Iteration 114 - /presences Page Realignment Testing: Verified the new PresencesPage component replaces DisputeCenter for declarative attendance sheet collection. All 9 test cases passed. Backend endpoint GET /api/attendance-sheets/pending returns correct structure. Frontend shows empty state correctly with no reclassification UI or financial terms.

backend_api: ✅ No reclassification fields in pending sheets response
frontend_playwright: ✅ Login flow: Navigate to /signin, login with igaal@hotmail.com / Test123!, redirect to /dashboard
✅ Empty state message 'Aucune feuille de presence en attente' visible
✅ ZERO elements with data-testid starting with 'reclassify-btn-' found
✅ No forbidden financial terms found (pénalité, garantie, conflit d'intérêt)
✅ Navbar Presences link visible and points to /presences
code_review_verification: ✅ App.js line 90: /presences route maps to PresencesPage (not DisputeCenter)
✅ AppNavbar.js line 27: Badge calls attendanceAPI.pendingSheets() not pendingReviews()
✅ declarative_routes.py: GET /pending endpoint filters by declarative_phase='collecting'

context_for_next_testing_agent: The /presences page realignment is complete. The page now shows attendance sheets for declarative collection (not financial reclassification). Currently no appointments have declarative_phase='collecting', so the list is empty - this is expected behavior. The old DisputeCenter component still exists in codebase but is no longer used on /presences route. The reclassify flow still exists via attendanceAPI.reclassify() but is not accessible from /presences.

features_verified.1_presences_page_loads: ✅ VERIFIED - Title 'Feuilles de presence', description visible, no errors
features_verified.2_empty_state: ✅ VERIFIED - Shows 'Aucune feuille de presence en attente' with checkmark icon (data-testid='presences-empty')
features_verified.3_no_reclassification_ui: ✅ VERIFIED - ZERO elements with data-testid starting with 'reclassify-btn-'
features_verified.4_no_financial_messages: ✅ VERIFIED - Page does NOT contain 'pénalité', 'garantie', 'conflit d'intérêt'
features_verified.6_navbar_badge: ✅ VERIFIED - Presences nav item renders correctly, link points to /presences
features_verified.8_attendance_sheet_accessible: ✅ VERIFIED via code review - Route exists at /appointments/:id/attendance-sheet
